ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio sample */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the audio sample */,
  "wer" REAL /* Word error rate of the transcription */,
  "wer_n" REAL /* Normalized word error rate */,
  "cer" REAL /* Character error rate of the transcription */,
  "cer_n" REAL /* Normalized character error rate */,
  "audio_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the audio sample in seconds */,
  "audio_format" TEXT /* Format of the audio file (e.g., WAV, MP3) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the audio sample was uploaded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the audio sample (e.g., customer service, medical dictation) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used to generate the initial transcription */,
  "transcription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initial transcription generated from this audio sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcriptions" (
  "transcription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcription entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audio sample related to this transcription */,
  "transcription_text" TEXT /* Text of the transcription generated by the model */,
  "prediction_text" TEXT /* Predicted corrected text based on the model's analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the transcription */,
  "transcription_date" TEXT /* Date when the transcription was generated */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used to generate the transcription */,
  "is_corrected" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the transcription has been corrected */,
  "corrected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who corrected the transcription */,
  "correction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transcription was corrected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcriptions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES audio_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model used for transcription */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model capabilities */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data used for the model */,
  "accuracy_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing various accuracy metrics (e.g., WER, CER) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the sample */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the sample (e.g., browser, OS) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES audio_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcription_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "transcription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transcription being assessed */,
  "wer" REAL /* Word error rate of the transcription */,
  "cer" REAL /* Character error rate of the transcription */,
  "wer_n" REAL /* Normalized word error rate */,
  "cer_n" REAL /* Normalized character error rate */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used to generate the quality metrics */,
  "quality_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality metrics were calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcription_quality_transcription_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcription_id") REFERENCES transcriptions ("transcription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "transcription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcription related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_transcription_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcription_id") REFERENCES transcriptions ("transcription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
